title: Latest News from Science Magazine
description: Keyword search result for Alerts: News Weekly Headlines -- New results matching your keyword search query (updated daily).

items.title: In the remote Amazon, locals are saving a giant fish—and helping their villages
items.description: Project has brought income and electricity while protecting wide swaths of tropical forest

items.title: Ancient ice core could help explain mysterious shift in Earth’s ice ages
items.description: Record-setting Antarctic archive reveals sharp swings in carbon dioxide 1 million years ago

items.title: Magic mushroom compound shows promise against cocaine addiction
items.description: Small study that prioritized Black and low-income participants yields “remarkable” results

items.title: AI agents may be skilled researchers—but not always honest ones
items.description: Two high-profile tools have been shown to make up data and “p-hack” their results

items.title: Astronomers unlock a sharper view from JWST using a ‘keyhole’ trick
items.description: A revived technique could reveal planets near their stars and the inner workings of galaxies

items.title: Core of Solar System’s largest moon may still be forming
items.description: Ganymede discovery could force rethink of how worlds power their magnetic fields

items.title: CDC leader calls for new journal to ‘elevate scientific rigor’
items.description: Bhattacharya publicly slams vaccine study he pulled from agency’s flagship publication

items.title: Cruise ship’s hantavirus outbreak puts researchers in uncharted territory
items.description: Questions about the culprit virus and its route of spread remain as health officials make plans for stranded passengers

items.title: Have archaeologists found the long-lost Maya city of Sac Balam?
items.description: Architectural and geographic details match historic descriptions of the colonial, centuries-old jungle refuge

items.title: Chaotic whale rescue shocks marine biologists
items.description: Timmy, a humpback whale stranded in Germany 6 weeks ago, was ailing and may already be dead
